derived_from.hypothesis: The prompt fix should not over-correct into proposing context updates for plan lookups.

intent: Synthetic negative control for feedback #10: asking to see the plan should not propose a context/log update.

notes: Synthetic negative control derived from feedback #10. It guards against over-correcting the log-update behavior into false-positive context updates.
